chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ الْجَارِيَةُ يَطَؤُهَا فَتَحْبَلُ فَيَتَّهِمُهَا .
chapter_title.en: Chapter 129 – The man happens to have a slave girl, so he sleeps with her, and she falls pregnant, so he accuses her

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ كَانَتْ لَهُ جَارِيَةٌ يَطَؤُهَا وَ هِيَ تَخْرُجُ فِي حَوَائِجِهِ فَحَبِلَتْ فَخَشِيَ أَنْ لَا يَكُونَ مِنْهُ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ أَ يَبِيعُ الْجَارِيَةَ وَ الْوَلَدَ قَالَ يَبِيعُ الْجَارِيَةَ وَ لَا يَبِيعُ الْوَلَدَ وَ لَا يُوَرِّثُهُ مِنْ مِيرَاثِهِ شَيْئاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Adam Bin Is’haq, from a man from our companions, from Abdul Hameed Bin Ismail who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who had a slave girl for him, he slept with her and she used to go out regarding his needs. So she became pregnant, and he feared that it may not be from him. How should he deal, should he sell the slave girl and the child?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He sells the slave girl but does not sell the child, and he would not inherit him anything from his inheritance’.
